headliner_use_case: Reduce bed assignment latency and discharge delays during capacity surges.
worked: Security review was strongest when scope and action permissions stayed bounded to a few patient-flow actions.
failed: Security concerns entered too late relative to architecture and build decisions.

reusable_lessons.change: Push a security-readiness checkpoint earlier in the build-to-review handoff so sensitive workflows are bounded before app polish accelerates.

redaction_notes: Synthetic example; generalized patient-flow framing only.
